column1: # Simon the Sorcerer 繁體中文譯表
# 格式: 英文<TAB>繁體中文
# 由 tools/build_translation.py 編成 Big5 的 simon_zh.tab
Use it to Save, Load or Quit.
Use this to speed around the game.
column2: 用來在遊戲中快速移動。

column1: You can up it or down it.
Mix me a Wet Wizard, barkeep.
column2: 酒保，幫我調一杯溼巫師。

column1: Can you do me a Cool Red Witch?
I've changed my mind about magical stuff.
column2: 我對魔法玩意改變主意了。

column1: I've finally got my spell book back.
column2: 我終於拿回我的魔法書了。
可以讓我看點別的東西嗎？

column1: I wonder where the rest of the rat is ?
column2: 我在想老鼠的其它部分去哪了？

column1: I can't imagine what use I'll have for it.
column2: 我想不出這東西能有什麼用處。

column1: I could make it worth your while.
I wonder if I should ask for a refund.
column2: 我在想是不是該要求退費。

column1: I got them from the oaf in the forest.
column2: 我從森林裡那個呆子那裡拿到的。

column1: I pounded it out of some seeds.
column2: 我從一些種子裡搗出來的。

column1: I can turn people into stone with this.
column2: 我可以用這個把人變成石頭。

column1: I hope it's not like the one up the stairs...
column2: 希望不要跟樓上那個一樣……

column1: What do you know about Sordid?
Sorry, I thought you were someone else.
Something tells me they don't welcome visitors.
column2: 感覺上他們不歡迎訪客。

column1: I'm sure we can come to some arrangement.
column2: 我相信我們可以達成某種協議。

column1: A fine example of its kind.
A fine example of a bucket of water.
A metal slops bucket. There is a hole in the side of it.
column2: 一個金屬餿水桶。側面有個洞。

column1: A hook attached to a length of rope.
A lump of metal bearing rock.
A metal bar from inside a bell.
column2: 一根從鐘裡取出的金屬棒。

column1: A piece of wood with a burnt end.

column2: 一根看起來威力強大的巫師法杖。

column1: A roll of Super XXXXX Strong mints.
column2: 一捲超強超強超強超強超強薄荷糖。

column1: A single strand of white dog hair.
A smelly liquid in a jar.

column2: 一個特別堅硬的斧頭頭。

column1: A specimen collecting jar for invertebrates.
column2: 一個無脊椎動物採集罐。

column1: A statue of a really ugly barbarian.
column2: 一座醜到不行的野蠻人雕像。

column1: A stone table used for the sacrificing of shaved lions.
column2: 一張用來獻祭剃毛獅子的石桌。

column1: A voucher for a free glass of beer at the Drunken Druid.
column2: 一張可在醉德魯伊酒館兌換免費啤酒的禮券。
一把輕量碳化鎢羊角錘。

column1: A beekeeper's hat and fashion accessory.
column2: 一頂兼具時尚配件功能的養蜂帽。

column1: It doesn't work. I don't know why I bought it.
column2: 這沒用。我不知道當初為什麼買它。

column1: It has a fossil in the middle of it.
It has the words 'DRINK ME' on the bottle.
It looks like a lump of kryptonite.
It says 'Equal rights for Trolls' on it.
It smells of hundred year old Gorgonzola.
column2: 聞起來像百年陳釀的戈貢佐拉起司。

column1: It tells you all about magic wands.
column2: 裡面都在講魔法棒的事。

column1: It's a door set into an old tree.
column2: 這是一扇嵌在老樹裡的門。

column1: It's a magic mushroom with 'EAT ME' written on it.
column2: 這是一朵寫著「吃我」的魔法蘑菇。

column1: It's a shopping list addressed to the storekeeper in town.
column2: 這是一張寫給鎮上店主的購物清單。
上面塗滿了潦草的字跡。

column1: It's got something stuck in the end of it.
It's long and hard with a pointy end.
It's made from real dwarf hair.
column2: 是用真正的矮人毛製成的。

column1: It's set to milrith finding mode.
column2: 設定在尋找米爾里斯礦的模式。

column1: It's the oldest thing in the entire game.
column2: 這是整個遊戲中最古老的東西。

column1: The Great Ring. It has strange symbols on it.
column2: 至尊之戒。上面有奇怪的符號。

column1: The complex arrangement of valves and metal tubes.
column2: 複雜排列的閥門和金屬管。

column1: The equivalent of a giant joint for bees.
column2: 對蜜蜂來說等於一根巨大的大麻菸。

column1: The magnet with the rope tied to it.
There's a piece of paper under this rock.
column2: 這塊石頭下面有一張紙。

column1: They're fine examples of their kind.
column2: 是它們同類中的佼佼者。

column1: Enough beer for a really good night.
column2: 足夠讓今晚喝得盡興的啤酒。

column1: Brochures for the Fiery Pits of Rondor.
My Wizkid club wallet. It's full of useless junk.
column2: 我的巫師小子俱樂部錢包。裡面裝滿了沒用的垃圾。

column1: My mahogany has been munched by a horde of woodworm.
column2: 我的桃花心木被一群蛀蟲啃了。

column1: Its lucky my hat is fireproofed.
column2: 還好我的帽子有防火處理。

column1: A fine example of it's kind.
A goblin key made from two teeth and a pencil.
column2: 一把用兩顆牙齒和一支鉛筆做的哥布林鑰匙。

column1: A pin used as a foothold for climbing across a rockface.
column2: 一根用來攀爬岩壁當腳踏的岩釘。

column1: A small squeaky thing that likes cheese.
column2: 一個吱吱叫又愛吃起司的小東西。

column1: A special herb with strange properties.
column2: 一種有奇特功效的藥草。

column1: Apparently its some sort of magical metal polish.
column2: 顯然是某種魔法金屬拋光劑。

column1: It looks like the sort of thing a Witch might fly on.
column2: 看起來像是女巫會騎著飛的那種東西。

column1: It's Sordid's spellbook. It looks just like mine.
column2: 這是索迪德的魔法書。看起來跟我的長得一樣。

column1: Sticky, yellow wax from the beehive.
column2: 從蜂窩取出的黏黏黃蠟。

column1: Whoever he was, he had an enormous nose.
column2: 不管他是誰，他有個巨大的鼻子。
